title: Adjust score-level panel slot background and padding
description: Change score-level procedure/evaluation replacement panel slot from warning tint to bg-background and remove excessive outer padding. Keep only standard side and bottom spacing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Changed the score-level procedure/evaluation slot surface from bg-warning/20 to bg-background and removed the extra inner p-4/rounded inset. The replacement panels now keep only the standard side and bottom padding from the outer list container. Focused tests and dashboard typecheck pass.
